description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The individual is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve sweater and straight-cut pants, both of which appear to be made from casual, everyday fabrics. The shoes are sturdy and practical, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The figure's hair is straight, of medium length, and frames the face, which has a neutral expression. The overall appearance is that of a typical city dweller, ready for daily activities such as commuting or walking on sidewalks.
description: A casually dressed adult standing upright, wearing a sweater, straight pants, and practical shoes, with medium-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and the relaxed position of the arms and hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the straight cut of the pants and sweater.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the natural stance of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve sweater and straight-cut pants
